title: GateAnswer
description: NDJSON line sent by the cloud inbox (or a local operator) in response to an open GateRecord. Correlated to the gate by gateId.

type.description: NDJSON discriminant so a single stream can carry multiple record types.

optionId.description: Chosen option id, or null when the operator supplied only freeText.

freeText.description: Present when the operator typed a free-text answer. Required whenever optionId is null.

deliveryId.description: Dedupe key on the driving session — same deliveryId must not be applied twice.

allOf.description: optionId=null requires a non-empty freeText — mirrored by the Zod .refine() on the driving side.
